entries.title: Color Theory
entries.content: Primary colors: red, blue, yellow (paint) or red, green, blue (light). Complementary colors opposite on wheel.

entries.title: Music Scales
entries.content: Major scale: W-W-H-W-W-W-H (whole/half steps). Minor scales convey different moods. Key signature sets sharps/flats.

entries.title: Impressionism
entries.content: 19th-century art movement (Monet, Renoir) capturing light and moment with visible brushstrokes, often outdoors.

entries.title: Film Shot Types
entries.content: Wide shot (context), medium (dialogue), close-up (emotion). Editing, lighting, and sound shape storytelling.

entries.title: Rhythm in Music
entries.content: Pattern of beats in time. Time signature (4/4 common). Tempo measured in BPM (beats per minute).
